words.exampleBs: Novac nije dovoljan da kupi sreću.
words.exampleEn: Money is not enough to buy happiness.

words.exampleBs: Koja je cijena ovog artikla?
words.exampleEn: What is the price of this item?

words.exampleBs: Trošak najma je visok ovog mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: The cost of rent is high this month.

words.exampleBs: Zaposlenici kompanije primaju mjesečnu platu.
words.exampleEn: The company employees receive a monthly salary.

words.exampleBs: Moramo se pridržavati utvrđenog budžeta.
words.exampleEn: We must stick to the specified budget.

words.exampleBs: Porodica je stavila svoju uštedjevinu u banku.
words.exampleEn: The family deposited their savings in the bank.

words.exampleBs: Isplatio je dug nakon cijele godine.
words.exampleEn: He paid off the debt after a full year.

words.exampleBs: Kompanija je zatražila kredit od banke.
words.exampleEn: The company requested a loan from the bank.

words.exampleArabic: تَجِبُ عَلَيْكَ دَفْعُ الضَّرِيبَةِ فِي مَوْعِدِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Morate platiti porez na vrijeme.
words.exampleEn: You must pay the tax on time.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلْتُ عَلَى خَصْمٍ بِنِسْبَةِ عِشْرِينَ بِالْمِئَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio sam popust od dvadeset posto.
words.exampleEn: I got a discount of twenty percent.

words.exampleArabic: حَقَّقَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ رِبْحًا كَبِيرًا هَذَا الْعَامَ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je ostvarila veliku dobit ove godine.
words.exampleEn: The company achieved a large profit this year.

words.exampleBs: Trgovac je pretrpio veliki gubitak.
words.exampleEn: The merchant suffered a heavy loss.

words.exampleBs: Sutra otvaram račun u banci.
words.exampleEn: I am opening an account at the bank tomorrow.

words.exampleBs: Stanje na mom računu je malo ovog mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: My account balance is low this month.

words.exampleBs: Prihvatate li plaćanje karticom?
words.exampleEn: Do you accept payment by card?

words.exampleBs: Podigao sam gotovinu s bankomata.
words.exampleEn: I withdrew cash from the ATM.

words.exampleBs: Poslao sam iznos putem bankovnog transfera.
words.exampleEn: I sent the amount via bank transfer.

words.exampleBs: Uplatila sam platu na račun.
words.exampleEn: I deposited the salary into the account.

words.exampleArabic: الْحَدُّ الْيَوْمِيُّ لِلسَّحْبِ هُوَ أَلْفُ دِرْهَمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dnevni limit podizanja je hiljadu dirhama.
words.exampleEn: The daily withdrawal limit is one thousand dirhams.

words.exampleArabic: تَفْرِضُ بَعْضُ الْبُنُوكِ فَائِدَةً عَلَى الْقُرُوضِ.
words.exampleBs: Neke banke naplaćuju kamatu na kredite.
words.exampleEn: Some banks charge interest on loans.

words.exampleBs: Prodavnica se otvara u devet ujutro.
words.exampleEn: The shop opens at nine in the morning.

words.exampleBs: Kupio sam povrće na narodnoj pijaci.
words.exampleEn: I bought vegetables from the local market.

words.exampleBs: Sačuvaj priznanicu radi mogućnosti zamjene.
words.exampleEn: Keep the receipt for the possibility of exchange.

words.exampleBs: Dobavljač je poslao fakturu e-poštom.
words.exampleEn: The supplier sent the invoice by email.

words.exampleArabic: أَتَمَّ الشِّرَاءَ بَعْدَ الْمُوَافَقَةِ عَلَى السِّعْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Završio je kupovinu nakon što se složio s cijenom.
words.exampleEn: He completed the purchase after agreeing on the price.

words.exampleBs: Prodaja je počela rano ujutro.
words.exampleEn: The sale began early in the morning.

words.exampleBs: Može se platiti gotovinom ili karticom.
words.exampleEn: Payment can be made in cash or by card.

words.exampleArabic: أُفَضِّلُ الدَّفْعَ بِالنَّقْدِ فِي هَذِهِ الْحَالَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Preferiram plaćanje gotovinom u ovom slučaju.
words.exampleEn: I prefer paying in cash in this case.

words.exampleArabic: نَسِيتَ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ الْبَاقِيَ مِنَ الصُّنْدُوقِ.
words.exampleBs: Zaboravio si uzeti kusur od blagajne.
words.exampleEn: You forgot to take the change from the register.

words.exampleBs: Nacionalna ekonomija raste postojano.
words.exampleEn: The national economy is growing steadily.

words.exampleBs: Međunarodna trgovina potiče ekonomski rast.
words.exampleEn: International trade promotes economic growth.

words.exampleArabic: يَزِيدُ الِاسْتِيرَادُ عَلَى التَّصْدِيرِ هَذَا الْعَامَ.
words.exampleBs: Uvoz premašuje izvoz ove godine.
words.exampleEn: Imports exceed exports this year.

words.exampleBs: Izvoz nafte je značajno porastao.
words.exampleEn: Oil exports rose by a significant percentage.

words.exampleBs: Roba je stigla u skladište juče.
words.exampleEn: The goods arrived at the warehouse yesterday.

words.exampleBs: Kompanija pruža raznovrsne finansijske usluge.
words.exampleEn: The company provides various financial services.

words.exampleBs: Građani pate od porasta cijena.
words.exampleEn: Citizens are suffering from the rise in prices.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُنَافَسَةُ فِي السُّوقِ تُحَسِّنُ جَوْدَةَ الْمُنْتَجَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Konkurencija na tržištu poboljšava kvalitet proizvoda.
words.exampleEn: Competition in the market improves product quality.

words.exampleBs: Moj brat je kupio novi auto juče.
words.exampleEn: My brother bought a new car yesterday.

words.exampleBs: Trgovac je brzo prodao svoju robu.
words.exampleEn: The merchant sold his goods quickly.

words.exampleArabic: دَفَعَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ رَوَاتِبَ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ فِي الْمَوْعِدِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je isplatila plaće zaposlenika na vrijeme.
words.exampleEn: The company paid the employees' salaries on time.

words.exampleArabic: يَدَّخِرُ كُلَّ شَهْرٍ جُزْءًا مِنْ رَاتِبِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki mjesec uštedi dio svoje plaće.
words.exampleEn: He saves part of his salary every month.

words.exampleArabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَسْتَثْمِرَ مُدَّخَرَاتِهِ فِي مَشْرُوعٍ حَلَالٍ.
words.exampleBs: Odlučio je uložiti svoju uštedjevinu u halal projekat.
words.exampleEn: He decided to invest his savings in a halal project.

words.exampleArabic: اقْتَرَضَ الْمَبْلَغَ مِنْ صَدِيقِهِ دُونَ فَائِدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Posudio je iznos od prijatelja bez kamate.
words.exampleEn: He borrowed the amount from his friend without interest.

words.exampleArabic: أَنْفَقَ كُلَّ مُدَّخَرَاتِهِ فِي شَهْرٍ وَاحِدٍ.
words.exampleBs: Potrošio je svu svoju uštedjevinu za jedan mjesec.
words.exampleEn: He spent all his savings in one month.

words.exampleBs: Računovođa je tačno izračunao troškove za ovaj mjesec.
words.exampleEn: The accountant carefully calculated the month's expenses.

words.en: to afford, to be able to pay
words.exampleArabic: لَا أَسْتَطِيعُ الدَّفْعَ لِهَذَا الْمَنْتَجِ الآنَ.
words.exampleBs: Ne mogu si priuštiti ovaj proizvod sada.
words.exampleEn: I cannot afford this product right now.
